functions.body:
call_provider() {
  local fn="$1" shift_args=("${@:2}")
  if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    "$fn" "${shift_args[@]}"
    return $?
  fi
  return 127
}

refresh_models_dispatch() {
  local destfile="${1:-${MODELS_FILE:-$GROQBASH_MODELS_DIR/models.txt}}"
  local fn="refresh_models_${PROVIDER}"
  local rc=0
  if ! type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    log_error "MODELREFRESH" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not implement $fn()."
    return 127
  fi
  if "$fn" "$destfile" 2>/dev/null; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "MODELREFRESH" "Models refreshed for provider $PROVIDER -> $destfile"
    fi
    return 0
  fi
  rc=$?
  if "$fn" 2>/dev/null; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "MODELREFRESH" "Models refreshed for provider $PROVIDER (no explicit dest)"
    fi
    return 0
  fi
  rc=$?
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "refresh_models for provider $PROVIDER failed (rc $rc)."
  return "$rc"
}

validate_model_dispatch() {
  local model="$1"
  local fn="validate_model_${PROVIDER}"
  if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    "$fn" "$model"
    return $?
  fi
  if [ -z "${VALIDATE_MODEL_DISPATCH_WARNED:-}" ]; then
    log_warn "MODEL" "provider '${PROVIDER}' does not implement ${fn}; falling back to permissive validation."
    VALIDATE_MODEL_DISPATCH_WARNED=1
  fi
  return 0
}

resolve_model() {
  ALLOWED_MODELS="${ALLOWED_MODELS:-}"
  if [ -n "${MODEL:-}" ] && [ "${MODEL_CLI_SET:-0}" -ne 1 ]; then
    model_cfg="$(canonical_model_file "${PROVIDER:-groq}")"
    if [ ! -s "$model_cfg" ]; then
      log_warn "MODEL" "MODEL is set in environment but not passed with -m/--set-default; use -m for per-run override or --set-default to persist."
    fi
  fi
  FINAL_MODEL=""
  if [ "${MODEL_CLI_SET:-0}" -eq 1 ] && [ -n "${MODEL:-}" ]; then
    FINAL_MODEL="$MODEL"
    return 0
  fi
  if [ -n "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" ]; then
    active_provider="${PROVIDER_CLI}"
  elif [ -f "$(canonical_provider_file)" ] && [ -s "$(canonical_provider_file)" ]; then
    active_provider="$(sed -n '1p' "$(canonical_provider_file)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    active_provider="$(printf '%s' "$active_provider" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
    [ -z "$active_provider" ] && active_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  else
    active_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  fi
  if [ -n "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" ]; then
    active_provider="${PROVIDER_CLI}"
  elif [ -f "$(canonical_provider_file)" ] && [ -s "$(canonical_provider_file)" ]; then
    active_provider="$(sed -n '1p' "$(canonical_provider_file)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    active_provider="$(printf '%s' "$active_provider" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
    [ -z "$active_provider" ] && active_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  else
    active_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  fi
  MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG="$(canonical_model_file "${active_provider}")"
  if [ -z "$(canonical_config_dir)" ] || [ "$(canonical_config_dir)" = "/" ]; then
    log_error "SEC" "refusing to read provider-specific model file: invalid canonical config dir: $(canonical_config_dir)"
  else
    if [ -s "$MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG" ]; then
      candidate="$(sed -n '1p' "$MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG" 2>/dev/null || true)"
      candidate="$(printf '%s' "$candidate" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
      norm="$(printf '%s' "$candidate" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##')"
      if [ -n "$norm" ] && is_supported_model "$norm"; then
        if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
          return 0
        fi
      fi
    fi
  fi
  candidate="$(auto_select_model_dispatch 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$candidate" ]; then
    norm="$(printf '%s' "$candidate" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##')"
    if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
        return 0
      fi
    fi
  fi
  if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
    cnt=0
    while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
      [ -z "$m" ] && continue
      cnt=$((cnt+1))
      norm="$(printf '%s' "$m" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##')"
      if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
        if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
          return 0
        fi
      fi
      [ "$cnt" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ] && break
    done < "$MODELS_FILE"
  fi
  if [ -f "${GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR%/}/config" ]; then
    cfg_model="$(awk -F= '/^MODEL=/ {sub(/^MODEL=/,""); print; exit}' "${GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR%/}/config" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    cfg_model="$(printf '%s' "$cfg_model" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
    norm="$(printf '%s' "$cfg_model" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##')"
    if [ -n "$norm" ] && is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
        return 0
      fi
    fi
  fi
  if [ -n "${ALLOWED_MODELS:-}" ]; then
    cnt=0
    while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
      [ -z "$m" ] && continue
      cnt=$((cnt+1))
      norm="$(printf '%s' "$m" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##')"
      if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
        if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
          return 0
        fi
      fi
      [ "$cnt" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ] && break
    done <<EOF
$(printf '%s\n' "$ALLOWED_MODELS")
EOF
  fi
  FINAL_MODEL=""
  return 1
}

build_payload_from_vars() {
  ensure_run_tmpdir
  local fn="buildpayload_${PROVIDER}"
  if call_provider "$fn"; then
    return 0
  else
    rc=$?
    if [ "$rc" -eq 127 ]; then
      log_error "PROVIDER" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not provide $fn()."
      exit "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
    else
      return "$rc"
    fi
  fi
}

call_api_once() {
  if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      show_payload_head "$PAYLOAD" 200 || true
      log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: skipping provider HTTP call"
    fi
    return 0
  fi
  local fn="call_api_${PROVIDER}"
  if call_provider "$fn"; then
    return 0
  else
    rc=$?
    if [ "$rc" -eq 127 ]; then
      log_error "PROVIDER" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not provide $fn()."
      exit "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
    else
      return "$rc"
    fi
  fi
}

call_api_streaming() {
  if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      show_payload_head "$PAYLOAD" 200 || true
      log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: skipping provider streaming HTTP call"
    fi
    return 0
  fi
  local fn="call_api_streaming_${PROVIDER}"
  if call_provider "$fn"; then
    return 0
  else
    rc=$?
    if [ "$rc" -eq 127 ]; then
      log_error "PROVIDER" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not provide $fn()."
      exit "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
    else
      return "$rc"
    fi
  fi
}

extract_api_error() {
  [ ! -s "${RESP:-}" ] && return 0
  if jq -e . "$RESP" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    jq -r '([.error?.message//empty]+[.choices[]?|(.message?.content//.delta?.content//empty)])|map(select(length>0))|.[0]//empty' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true
  else
    awk 'NF{print; exit}' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
}

detect_empty_edge_case() {
  local resp="${RESP:-}"
  GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=0
  GROQBASH_EDGE_REQ_ID=""
  GROQBASH_EDGE_FINISH_REASON=""
  GROQBASH_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS=0
  local tmp_copy
  tmp_copy="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}" resp_copy 2>/dev/null)" || return 1
  cp -f "$resp" "$tmp_copy" 2>/dev/null || return 1
  resp="$tmp_copy"
  if [ -z "${resp:-}" ] || [ ! -s "$resp" ]; then
    GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=1
    return 0
  fi
  if ! is_valid_json_file "$resp"; then
    GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=1
    return 0
  fi
  if jq -e 'has("diagnostic") and .diagnostic==true' "$resp" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=1
    return 0
  fi
  local content finish_reason completion_tokens req_id
  content="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.message?.content // .choices[0]?.delta?.content // ""' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
  finish_reason="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.finish_reason // ""' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
  completion_tokens="$(jq -r '.usage?.completion_tokens // 0' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  req_id="$(jq -r '.x_groq?.id // .id // empty' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
  GROQBASH_EDGE_REQ_ID="${req_id:-}"
  GROQBASH_EDGE_FINISH_REASON="${finish_reason:-}"
  GROQBASH_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS="${completion_tokens:-0}"
  if [ -z "$content" ] && [ "$finish_reason" = "stop" ] && [ "${completion_tokens:-0}" -le 1 ]; then
    GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=1
  else
    GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=0
  fi
  return 0
}

finalize_and_output() {
  local mode="$1" text="$2"
  local resp_file tmp_copy
  resp_file="${RESP:-}"
  if [ -n "$resp_file" ]; then
    tmp_copy="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}" resp_copy 2>/dev/null)" || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
    cp -f "$resp_file" "$tmp_copy" 2>/dev/null || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
    resp_file="$tmp_copy"
  fi
  if { [ "$mode" = "json" ] || [ "$mode" = "pretty" ]; } && [ ! -s "$resp_file" ]; then
    log_error "RESP" "response file missing or empty: ${RESP:-<unset>}"
    return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
  fi
  case "$mode" in
    json) cat "$resp_file" ;;
    pretty) if jq -e . "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq . "$resp_file"; else cat "$resp_file"; fi ;;
    raw) printf '%s' "$text" ;;
    text) printf '%s\n' "$text" ;;
    *) printf '%s\n' "$text" ;;
  esac
  if [ "$mode" = "text" ] || [ "$mode" = "raw" ]; then
    [ "${FORCE_SAVE_MODE:-}" = "nosave" ] && return 0
    local len do_save=0 dest_dir dest_path
    len="$(printf '%s' "$text" | wc -c | tr -d ' ')"
    if [ "${FORCE_SAVE_MODE:-}" = "save" ]; then
      do_save=1
    else
      if [ "$len" -gt "$THRESHOLD" ]; then
        do_save=1
      fi
    fi
    if [ "$do_save" -eq 1 ]; then
      if [ -n "$OUT_PATH" ]; then
        if [ -d "$OUT_PATH" ]; then
          dest_dir="$OUT_PATH"
          dest_path="$dest_dir/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-groq-output-$$.txt"
        else
          dest_path="$OUT_PATH"
          dest_dir="$(dirname "$dest_path")"
        fi
      else
        dest_dir="$GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR"
        dest_path="$dest_dir/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-groq-output-$$.txt"
      fi
      mkdir -p "$dest_dir" 2>/dev/null || true
      if [ -z "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ] || [ ! -d "$RUN_TMPDIR" ]; then
        log_error "TMPFAIL" "RUN_TMPDIR not available for saving output."
        return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
      fi
      save_to_history "$text" || log_warn "HISTORY" "Failed to save output to history."
    fi
  fi
}

perform_request_once() {
  local attempt=1 rc
  while [ "$attempt" -le "$MAX_RETRIES" ]; do
    if call_api_once; then
      if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: request simulated successfully. Payload: $PAYLOAD"
        fi
        return 0
      fi
      GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY=0
      GROQBASH_EDGE_REQ_ID=""
      GROQBASH_EDGE_FINISH_REASON=""
      GROQBASH_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS=0
      local text api_err
      text="$(extract_text_from_resp || true)"
      detect_empty_edge_case || true
      ui_last="${GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/last_api.json"
      if [ ! -f "$ui_last" ] || [ "$ui_last" -ot "${RESP:-/dev/null}" ]; then
        finish_reason="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.finish_reason // empty' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
        req_id="$(jq -r '.x_groq?.id // .id // empty' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
        edgecase=0
        if [ "${GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then edgecase=1; fi
        now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
        http_code_fallback=0
        if [ -s "$RESP" ]; then http_code_fallback=200; fi
        api_json="$(jq -c -n --argjson http "$http_code_fallback" --arg fr "${finish_reason:-}" --argjson edge "$edgecase" --arg id "${req_id:-}" --arg ts "$now_ts" '{last_http_status:$http, last_finish_reason:$fr, last_edgecase_detected:$edge, last_req_id:$id, last_time_utc:$ts}')"
        ui_state_write "last_api.json" "$api_json" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write fallback last_api.json"; fi; }
      fi
      if [ -z "$text" ] && [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" != "json" ] && [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" != "pretty" ]; then
        api_err="$(extract_api_error || true)"
        if [ -n "$api_err" ]; then
          log_error "API" "API error: $api_err"
          return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
        else
          if [ "${GROQBASH_EDGE_EMPTY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
            printf '%s\n' "API edge case detected: empty completion" "  req_id: ${GROQBASH_EDGE_REQ_ID:-<none>}" "  finish_reason: ${GROQBASH_EDGE_FINISH_REASON:-<none>}" "  completion_tokens: ${GROQBASH_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS:-0}" >&2
            log_error "API" "empty completion returned by provider (see previous diagnostic lines)."
            return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
          fi
          log_error "API" "no textual content extracted from response."
          if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
            head -n 50 "${RESP:-/dev/null}" >&2 || true
          fi
          return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
        fi
      fi
      if [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" = "text" ] || [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" = "raw" ]; then
        printf '\n'
      fi
      finalize_and_output "$OUTPUT_MODE" "$text"
      return 0
    else
      rc=$?
      if [ "$rc" -eq "$GROQBASHERRCURL_FAILED" ]; then
        printf 'groqbash: WARN: Network error (curl). Retrying...\n' >&2
      elif [ "$rc" -eq "$GROQBASHERRAPI" ]; then
        printf 'groqbash: ERROR: HTTP/API error. Not retrying.\n' >&2
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          head -n 50 "${RESP:-/dev/null}" >&2 || true
        fi
        return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
      else
        printf 'groqbash: WARN: Unknown error (code %s). Retrying...\n' "$rc" >&2
      fi
    fi
    attempt=$((attempt + 1)); sleep $((attempt * 1))
  done
  log_error "REQUEST" "request failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts."
  return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"
}

collect_input_from_files() {
  local out="" first=1 f
  for f in "$@"; do
    if file_readable "$f"; then
      [ "$first" -eq 0 ] && out="${out}"$'\n\n'"--- FILE: ${f} ---"$'\n\n'
      out="${out}$(cat "$f")"; first=0
    else log_error "FILE" "file not readable: $f"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; fi
  done
  printf '%s' "$out"
}

expand_args_to_content() {
  local out="" first=1 a
  for a in "${ARGS[@]}"; do
    if file_readable "$a"; then
      [ "$first" -eq 0 ] && out="${out}"$'\n\n'"--- FILE: ${a} ---"$'\n\n'
      out="${out}$(cat "$a")"; first=0
    else
      [ "$first" -eq 0 ] && out="${out}"$'\n\n'
      out="${out}${a}"; first=0
    fi
  done
  printf '%s' "$out"
}
trim() { printf '%s' "$1" | awk '{$1=$1; print}'; }
is_number() { printf '%s\n' "$1" | awk 'BEGIN{exit 0} {exit !( $0+0 == $0+0 )}'; }

list_models_cli() {
  if [ ! -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
    printf 'No models available locally. Consider --refresh-models.\n' >&2
    return 1
  fi
  local count=0 model norm
  while IFS= read -r model || [ -n "$model" ]; do
    [ -z "$model" ] && continue
    count=$((count+1))
    norm="$(printf '%s' "$model" | sed -e 's/^models\///' -e 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//')"
    if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      printf '%s\n' "$norm"
    else
      printf '%s\t[NOT SUPPORTED: Requires non-text input]\n' "$norm"
    fi
    if [ "$count" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ]; then break; fi
  done < "$MODELS_FILE"
  return 0
}

validate_model_core() {
  local model="$1" norm_model file_match
  [ -n "$model" ] || { printf 'groqbash: ERROR: validate_model_core: model required\n' >&2; return 1; }
  norm_model="$(printf '%s' "$model" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//')"
  norm_model="$(printf '%s' "$norm_model" | sed -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##')"
  if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
    if grep -x -F -q "$model" "$MODELS_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then
      file_match=1
    else
      if awk '{g=$0; sub(/^models\//,"",g); sub(/^groq[:\/ -]*/,"",g); print g}' "$MODELS_FILE" | grep -x -F -q "$norm_model" 2>/dev/null; then
        file_match=1
      else
        file_match=0
      fi
    fi
    if [ "$file_match" -ne 1 ]; then
      printf 'groqbash: ERROR: The model "%s" is not present in %s\n' "$model" "$MODELS_FILE" >&2
      return 1
    fi
  fi
  if ! is_supported_model "$norm_model"; then
    printf 'groqbash: ERROR: The "%s" model is not supported by GroqBash (requires non-text input).\n' "$model" >&2
    return 1
  fi
  return 0
}

blocks.body:
if [ -f "$SE_ENGINE_PATH" ] && [ "${GROQBASH_SESSION_ENGINE:-on}" != "off" ]; then
  if bash -n "$SE_ENGINE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then
    . "$SE_ENGINE_PATH"
    if type session_engine_build_window >/dev/null 2>&1 && type session_engine_append >/dev/null 2>&1 && type session_engine_enabled >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      if session_engine_enabled 2>/dev/null; then
        SE_AVAILABLE=1
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          log_info "SESSION" "Session Engine loaded and available"
        fi
      else
        SE_AVAILABLE=0
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          log_info "SESSION" "Session Engine loaded but disabled by module"
        fi
      fi
    else
      SE_AVAILABLE=0
      log_warn "SESSION" "Session Engine module missing required functions; falling back to legacy"
    fi
  else
    SE_AVAILABLE=0
    log_warn "SESSION" "Session Engine module has syntax errors; falling back to legacy"
  fi
else
  SE_AVAILABLE=0
  if [ -n "${SESSION_ID:-}" ]; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "SESSION" "Session Engine not available; using legacy session helpers"
    fi
  fi
fi

: "${ALLOW_API_CALLS:=1}"
if [ -n "${GROQ_API_KEY:-}" ] && ! is_truthy "${ALLOW_API_CALLS:-0}" && ! is_truthy "${DRY_RUN:-0}"; then
  log_error "APIKEY" "GROQ_API_KEY is set but ALLOW_API_CALLS!=1 and DRY_RUN!=1."
  exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
fi
_supported_providers_arr+=("groq")
extras_prov_dir="${PROVIDERS_DIR:-${GROQBASH_EXTRAS_DIR%/}/providers}"
if [ -z "${extras_prov_dir:-}" ]; then
  extras_prov_dir="$(canonical_config_dir)/providers"
fi
if [ -d "$extras_prov_dir" ]; then
  for pf in "$extras_prov_dir"/*.sh; do
    [ -e "$pf" ] || continue
    base="$(basename "$pf" .sh)"
    [ "$base" = "groq" ] && continue
    _supported_providers_arr+=("$base")
  done
fi
SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS="$(printf '%s ' "${_supported_providers_arr[@]}" | sed 's/ $//')"

if [ "${LIST_PROVIDERS_RAW:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ "${#_supported_providers_arr[@]}" -eq 0 ]; then
    exit 1
  fi
  for p in "${_supported_providers_arr[@]}"; do
    printf '%s\n' "$p"
  done
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${LIST_MODELS_RAW:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -n "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" ]; then
    PROVIDER="${PROVIDER_CLI}"
  fi
  if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
    awk '{g=$0;sub(/^models\//,"");sub(/^groq[:\/ -]*/,"");sub(/^[[:space:]]+/,"");sub(/[[:space:]]+$/,"");if (g != "") print g}' "$MODELS_FILE"
    exit 0
  else
    exit 2
  fi
fi

if [ "$LIST_PROVIDERS" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf 'Available providers:\n' >&2
  printf '  - groq (embedded)\n' >&2
  extras_prov_dir="$PROVIDERS_DIR"
  if [ -d "$extras_prov_dir" ]; then
    for f in "$extras_prov_dir"/*.sh; do
      [ -e "$f" ] || continue
      base="$(basename "$f" .sh)"
      [ "$base" = "groq" ] && continue
      printf '  - %s\n' "$base" >&2
    done
  fi
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$LIST_MODELS" -eq 1 ]; then
  if list_models_cli; then exit 0; else exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; fi
fi
if [ -n "$SET_DEFAULT_MODEL" ]; then
  if ! mkdir -p "$(canonical_config_dir)" 2>/dev/null; then
    log_error "SEC" "cannot create config dir: $(canonical_config_dir)"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
  fi
  if [ -L "$(canonical_config_dir)" ]; then log_error "SEC" "config dir is a symlink."; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; fi
  if [ -n "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" ]; then
    target_provider="${PROVIDER_CLI}"
  elif [ -f "$(canonical_provider_file)" ] && [ -s "$(canonical_provider_file)" ]; then
    target_provider="$(sed -n '1p' "$(canonical_provider_file)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    target_provider="$(printf '%s' "$target_provider" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
    [ -z "$target_provider" ] && target_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  else
    target_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  fi
  target_model_file="$(canonical_model_file "${target_provider}")"
  printf '%s\n' "$SET_DEFAULT_MODEL" | atomic_write "$target_model_file" 10 \
    || { log_error "SEC" "cannot write default model for provider ${target_provider} to ${target_model_file}."; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
  chmod 600 "$target_model_file" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf 'groqbash: INFO: Default model for provider %s set to: %s\n' "$target_provider" "$SET_DEFAULT_MODEL" >&2
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$STREAM_MODE" -eq 1 ] && { [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" = "json" ] || [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" = "pretty" ]; }; then
  log_error "ARGS" "--stream incompatible with --json/--pretty."
  exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
fi
if [ "${INSTALL_EXTRAS:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -n "${INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC:-}" ]; then
    SRC_BASE="${INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC%/}"
  else
    SRC_BASE="${SCRIPTDIR%/}/extras"
  fi
  if [ -d "${SRC_BASE}" ]; then
    SRC_BASE="$(cd "${SRC_BASE}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || printf '%s' "${SRC_BASE}")"
  else
    SRC_BASE="${SRC_BASE%/}"
  fi
  DEST_BASE="$(cd "${GROQBASH_EXTRAS_DIR%/}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || printf '%s' "${GROQBASH_EXTRAS_DIR%/}")"
  DEST_PROV="${PROVIDERS_DIR:-${DEST_BASE:-$(canonical_config_dir)}/providers}"
  if [ -d "${LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR}" ]; then
    LEGACY_REAL="$(cd "${LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || printf '%s' "${LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR}")"
    if [ "${LEGACY_REAL}" != "${DEST_BASE}" ] && [ "${LEGACY_REAL}" != "${SRC_BASE}" ]; then
      printf 'groqbash: ERROR: legacy extras directory found at %s\n' "${LEGACY_REAL}" >&2
      printf 'groqbash: ERROR: only %s is supported as runtime destination. Move or remove the legacy directory and retry.\n' "${DEST_BASE}" >&2
      exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
    fi
  fi
  if [ ! -d "${SRC_BASE}" ]; then
    log_error "EXTRAS" "missing extras source directory: ${SRC_BASE}"
    exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
  fi
  if [ -L "${SRC_BASE}" ]; then
    log_error "EXTRAS" "extras source is a symlink: ${SRC_BASE}"
    exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
  fi
  if [ "${SRC_BASE}" = "${DEST_BASE}" ]; then
    log_error "EXTRAS" "extras source and destination are identical (${SRC_BASE}); nothing to do."
    exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"
  fi
  case "${SRC_BASE}/" in
    "${DEST_BASE}/"*) log_error "EXTRAS" "extras source ${SRC_BASE} is inside destination ${DEST_BASE}; aborting to avoid nested copy."; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP" ;;
  esac
  mkdir -p "${DEST_BASE}" "${DEST_PROV}" 2>/dev/null || { log_error "EXTRAS" "cannot create extras dest: ${DEST_BASE}"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
  chmod 700 "${DEST_BASE}" 2>/dev/null || true
  files_to_copy=()
  while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do files_to_copy+=("$f"); done < <(find "${SRC_BASE}" -type f -print0 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ "${#files_to_copy[@]}" -eq 0 ]; then
    printf 'No extras files found under %s; nothing to install.\n' "${SRC_BASE}" >&2
    exit 0
  fi
  current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || printf '')"
  for src in "${files_to_copy[@]}"; do
    [ -f "$src" ] || { log_error "EXTRAS" "extras entry not a regular file: $src"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
    [ -L "$src" ] && { log_error "EXTRAS" "extras file is symlink: $src"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
    src_owner="$(_get_owner "$src")"
    [ -n "$src_owner" ] && [ "$src_owner" != "$current_user" ] && { log_error "EXTRAS" "wrong owner: $src"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
  done
  installed_providers=()
  installed_libs=()
  installed_docs=()
  installed_security=()
  installed_tests=()
  for src in "${files_to_copy[@]}"; do
    rel="${src#${SRC_BASE}/}"
    dest="${DEST_BASE}/${rel}"
    destdir="$(dirname "$dest")"
    mkdir -p "$destdir" 2>/dev/null || { log_error "EXTRAS" "cannot create dest dir: $destdir"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
    if type atomic_write >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      cat "$src" | atomic_write "$dest" 10 || { log_error "EXTRAS" "Error copying $src"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
    else
      cp -f "$src" "$dest" 2>/dev/null || { log_error "EXTRAS" "Error copying $src"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }
      chmod 600 "$dest" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
    chmod 600 "$dest" 2>/dev/null || true
    case "$rel" in
      providers/*.sh) installed_providers+=("$(basename "$rel" .sh)") ;;
      lib/*) installed_libs+=("$(basename "$rel")") ;;
      docs/*) installed_docs+=("$(basename "$rel")") ;;
      security/*) installed_security+=("$(basename "$rel")") ;;
      test/*) installed_tests+=("$(basename "$rel")") ;;
    esac
  done
  printf 'groqbash: INFO: Extras installed under %s\n' "${DEST_BASE}" >&2
  if [ "${#installed_providers[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    printf 'Installed providers: %s\n' "$(printf '%s ' "${installed_providers[@]}")" >&2
  fi
  if [ "${#installed_libs[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    printf 'Installed libs: %s\n' "$(printf '%s ' "${installed_libs[@]}")" >&2
  fi
  if [ "${#installed_docs[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    printf 'Installed docs: %s\n' "$(printf '%s ' "${installed_docs[@]}")" >&2
  fi
  if [ "${#installed_security[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    printf 'Installed security scripts: %s\n' "$(printf '%s ' "${installed_security[@]}")" >&2
  fi
  if [ "${#installed_tests[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    printf 'Installed test scripts: %s\n' "$(printf '%s ' "${installed_tests[@]}")" >&2
  fi
  for p in "${installed_providers[@]}"; do
    PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH="${DEST_PROV}/${p}.sh"
    if ! bash -n "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then
      printf 'groqbash: WARN: provider %s has syntax errors; check %s\n' "$p" "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" >&2
    fi
  done
  exit 0
fi

for flag in DRY_RUN STREAM_MODE INSTALL_EXTRAS PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE LIST_MODELS LIST_PROVIDERS CHAT_MODE QUIET SHOW_CONFIG DIAGNOSTICS; do
  if is_truthy "${!flag:-0}"; then printf -v "$flag" 1; else printf -v "$flag" 0; fi
done
